args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: data export manifest prepared
args.body: The data export manifest for Fernwood Ltd is complete, covering crm_contacts (primary-db), invoices (primary-db), usage_events (event-lake), and support_threads (helpdesk). No active legal hold applies.

args.subject: Your Halcyon access has now ended
args.body: This confirms that Fernwood Ltd's access to Halcyon has now been revoked, following the end of your contract.

args.subject: Your pro-rata Halcyon refund
args.body: A pro-rata refund of 240.00 has been issued to order ORD-3320 for the unused portion of your Halcyon subscription.

args.text: Refund of 240.00 issued against ORD-3320 and customer notified at accounts@fernwood.example.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: deletion schedule confirmed
args.body: Deletion schedule confirmed for Fernwood Ltd: exported datasets will be deleted on 2026-08-16, 30 days after export completion.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd offboarding complete
args.body: Fernwood Ltd's offboarding is complete: data exported, access revoked, refund issued, deletion scheduled, and register updated.
